rule_metadata.name: js_downloader_gootloader
rule_metadata.description: JavaScript downloader known to deliver Gootkit or REvil ransomware
rule_metadata.author: HP Threat Research @HPSecurity

rules.rule_text:
rule js_downloader_gootloader : downloader
{
	meta:
		description = "JavaScript downloader known to deliver Gootkit or REvil ransomware"
		reference = "https://github.com/hpthreatresearch/tools/blob/main/gootloader/js_downloader_gootloader.yar"
		author = "HP Threat Research @HPSecurity"
		filetype = "JavaScript"
		maltype = "Downloader"
		date = "2021-02-22"

	strings:
		$a = "function"
		$b1 = "while"
		$b2 = "if"
		$b3 = "else"
		$b4 = "return"
		$c = "charAt"
		$d = "substr"
		$e1 = "\".+"
		$e2 = "\\=\\\""
		$e3 = " r,"
		$e4 = "+;\\\""
		$f = /(\w+\[\w+\]\s+=\s+\w+\[\w+\[\w+\]\];)/

	condition:
		#a> 8 and #a > ( #b4 + 3 ) and all of ( $b* ) and ( $c or $d ) and any of ( $e* ) and $f and filesize < 8000
}
